meaning: n.譬ｹ豺ｱ闥ょ崋,迚｢荳榊庄遐ｴ
examples: The other issue, far more fundamental, is the apparent dilemma between ethnic rootedness and national identity.
If Holcomb was representative of that small-town rootedness that defined 1959 America, then the Clutters were representative of Holcomb.
The main criteria for including an element in the inventory were authenticity, representativeness, artistic value, vitality, rootedness in tradition.
